zh.lifeSummary: 當Forne Sigulfsson de Greystoke於1048年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾努波恩霍爾時，他的父親Sigulf FitzForne21歲，母親Ealdgyth19歲。他於1074年與Alditha Isabel de Broyes在英國波藍德格斯托可結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1129年11月30日在英國波藍德格斯托可享年81歲，埋葬在英國波藍德格斯托可聖 安德也斯 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Forne Sigulfsson de Greystoke于1048年出生在英国英格兰越可爾努波恩霍爾时，他的父亲Sigulf FitzForne21岁，母亲Ealdgyth19岁。他于1074年与Alditha Isabel de Broyes在英国波藍德格斯托可结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1129年11月30日在英国波藍德格斯托可享年81岁，埋葬在英国波藍德格斯托可聖 安德也斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Greystoke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Graystock
meanings: English: locative name, from Greystoke (Cumb), recorded as Graystock in 1291.

nameMeanings.name: Forne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Mainly Canadian: of uncertain derivation, but most probably taken from the name of the territory of Lorn(e) in Argyll (and thus a masculine form of Lorna ). One of the earliest bearers was the Canadian actor Lorne Greene ( 1915–1987 ), and the given name is now also found in Scotland.

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Forne Sigulfsson de Greystoke was born in 1048, in Nunburnholme, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sigulf FitzForne, was 21 and his mother, Ealdgyth, was 19. He married Alditha Isabel de Broyes in 1074, in Greystoke, Cumberland, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died on 30 November 1129, in Greystoke, Cumberland, England, at the age of 81, and was buried in St Andrew's Church, Greystoke, Cumberland, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Forne Sigulfsson de Greystoke est né en 1048, à Nunburnholme, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sigulf FitzForne, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Ealdgyth, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Alditha Isabel de Broyes en 1074, à Greystoke, Cumberland, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 30 novembre 1129, à Greystoke, Cumberland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 81 ans, et a été enterré à St Andrew's Church, Greystoke, Cumberland, Angleterre.

de.St Andrew's Church, Greystoke, Cumberlan: St Andrew's Church, Greystoke, Cumberland, England
de.lifeSummary: Als Forne Sigulfsson de Greystoke 1048 in Nunburnholme, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sigulf FitzForne 21 und seine Mutter Ealdgyth 19. Er hat 1074 in Greystoke, Cumberland, England Alditha Isabel de Broyes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 30. November 1129 im Alter von 81 Jahren in Greystoke, Cumberland, England und wurde in St Andrew's Church, Greystoke, Cumberland, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Forne Sigulfsson de Greystoke è nato il nel 1048 nel Nunburnholme, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sigulf FitzForne, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Ealdgyth, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Alditha Isabel de Broyes nel 1074, nel Greystoke, Cumberland, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 30 novembre 1129, nel Greystoke, Cumberland, England, all'età di 81 anni, e fu sepolto a St Andrew's Church, Greystoke, Cumberland, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Forne Sigulfsson de Greystokeが1048年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアヌンブルンhオルメで生まれた時，父Sigulf FitzForneは21歳，母Ealdgythは19歳であった。1074年にイギリスクウンバーランドグレイストクでAlditha Isabel de Broyesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1129年11月30日にイギリスクウンバーランドグレイストクで81歳で死去し，イギリスクウンバーランドグレイストクスト アンドリュー'ス チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.St Andrew's Church, Greystoke, Cumberlan: 영국 쿠벌랜드 그리스토크 스트 앤드루'스 처르치
ko.lifeSummary: Forne Sigulfsson de Greystoke(이)가 1048년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 누번홀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sigulf FitzForne(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Ealdgyth(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1074년 영국 쿠벌랜드 그리스토크에서 Alditha Isabel de Broyes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1129년 11월 30일 영국 쿠벌랜드 그리스토크에서 81세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 쿠벌랜드 그리스토크 스트 앤드루'스 처르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Forne Sigulfsson de Greystoke nasceu em 1048, em Nunburnholme, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sigulf FitzForne, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Ealdgyth, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Alditha Isabel de Broyes em 1074, em Greystoke, Cumberland, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 30 de novembro de 1129, em Greystoke, Cumberland, Inglaterra, com 81 anos, e foi sepultado em St Andrew's Church, Greystoke, Cumberland, Inglaterra.

ru.St Andrew's Church, Greystoke, Cumberlan: ст андрю'с чурч, гристок, кумбирланд, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Forne Sigulfsson de Greystoke родился в 1048 г. в местности нунбурнолм, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sigulf FitzForne было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Ealdgyth, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Alditha Isabel de Broyes в 1074 г. в местности гристок, кумбирланд, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер 30 ноября 1129 г. в местности гристок, кумбирланд, Англия в возрасте 81 год и был похоронен в местности ст андрю'с чурч, гристок, кумбирланд, Англия.
